## Title: Fix stack buffer overflow in telnet server process stats command

### Summary
The telnet server's process stats command contained a stack buffer overflow vulnerability when parsing `/proc/[pid]/stat` files. The `process_command` function used unsafe `sprintf()` calls to format process information into a fixed-size 1024-byte stack buffer (`prntline`) without bounds checking. Malicious or unusually long process names and stat fields could overflow the buffer, corrupting the stack and pot
